windows.embed_text_v2: styled display of finished branded scented candles in glass jars and leopard tin, lit copper jar candle, faux hydrangeas pink roses perfume bottle mirrored tray decor
windows.summary_v2: Styled decor b-roll of a collection of finished branded scented candles arranged with faux flowers and props on a mirrored tray, one or two lit.

seconds_v2.desc: Styled decor flat-lay on a mirrored tray: several finished branded scented candles, one lit, arranged with faux blue hydrangeas, pink roses, a perfume bottle and blue sunglasses.
Same arrangement, a clear glass jar candle labelled DOUGHNUT in front, a copper jar candle lit at right, leopard-print Voluspa tin centre.
Continued display of the grouped finished candles among flowers, mirrored surface reflecting them, one candle glowing.
Slight pan across the candle collection: white-wax jar candle lit in back, copper jar candle flame at right, decorative bow-tied lid in front.
Same styled candle group with hydrangeas and roses, the copper glass candle clearly lit.
Decor scene continues, multiple labelled jar and tin candles staged on the mirror tray with floral props.
Closer framing of the finished candles, Voluspa leopard tin and copper jar candle lit, white pillar-in-jar candle behind.
Continued view of the arranged scented candles and faux flowers, warm flame glow on the copper jar candle.
Final hold on the styled collection of finished branded candles, flowers and perfume on the reflective tray.
